nav.contacto_whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm contacting you from your website, I would like more information.

hero.subtitle: 100% covered parking strategically located minutes from Ezeiza Airport. Maximum security for your vehicle while you enjoy your destination.
hero.form_nota_hora: * Important: The time provided must be your flight departure time. Hours are counted from check-in time in 24h blocks.
hero.result_ahorro: You save {savings} compared to the official airport rate!
hero.result_whatsapp_msg_prefix: Hello Cocheras Ezeiza Sur, I would like to request a reservation:

notification_bar: ONE RESERVATION PER VEHICLE AND/OR ID.
COCHERAS EZEIZA SUR IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR MISSED SCHEDULES.

experiencia.title: THE EXPERIENCE WE OFFER
experiencia.card1_desc: Fully enclosed structure. Your vehicle is protected from hail and intense sun in our roofed garages.
experiencia.card2_desc: Premises guarded 24 hours a day with constant monitoring via closed-circuit cameras. Travel with complete peace of mind.
experiencia.card3_desc: We take up to 4 people to the airport right away in our vehicle. Service included in your rate, with no hidden costs.
experiencia.card4_desc: An unexpected issue upon return? We provide free assistance with tire inflation or a battery jump-start so you can leave stress-free.
experiencia.card5_desc: We are a family business, run directly by its owners. We guarantee warm and personalized treatment for every passenger.
experiencia.card6_desc: We understand that flights and plans can change. You can cancel or modify your reservation at any time at no additional cost.
experiencia.cta_subtitle: Same security, better service, unbeatable price.
experiencia.cta_whatsappMessage: Hi, I'm coming from the website. I would like to take advantage of the 40% promotion.

servicios.title: Our Core Services

trasladoSteps.title: 1. FAST CHECK-IN
trasladoSteps.desc: Drop off your car. We instantly register your details and flight for complete control and security.

trasladoSteps.title: 2. DIRECT SHUTTLE
trasladoSteps.desc: We´ll drive you in our shuttle (up to 4 passengers). Guaranteed space for your group and luggage.

trasladoSteps.title: 3. QUICK RETURN
trasladoSteps.desc: Upon landing, contact us via WhatsApp and we´ll coordinate the meeting point!

valetSteps.title: 1. TERMINAL DROP OFF
valetSteps.desc: Go straight to the airport (Ezeiza or Aeroparque). Leave your car with us at the door and go to your flight without delays.

valetSteps.title: 2. SECURE PARKING
valetSteps.desc: We take care of transporting your vehicle and storing it in our 100% covered garages while you travel.

valetSteps.title: 3. DELIVERY UPON LANDING
valetSteps.desc: When you return, we will be waiting with your car at arrivals ready for you to go home.

servicios.extraCostsDesc: + {valet_standard} (Pickup and delivery at Ezeiza). + {valet_combinado} (Combined: e.g., Pickup at EZE and delivery at AEP, or vice versa).

modalidades.title: Choose your plan
modalidades.subtitle: Choose the option that best suits your trip. Absolute comfort at every step.

cards.title: CRUISES
features: Vehicle pick-up and delivery at cruise terminals and Buquebus.

identidad.title: WHO WE ARE?
identidad.card1_desc: We design a maximum protection environment for your assets. Our facilities feature 100% enclosed garages with walls and roofs, ensuring absolute protection from weather elements.
identidad.card1_feat1_desc: Professional 24/7 surveillance with high-definition camera systems.
identidad.card1_feat2_desc: Synchronized logistics for terminal transfers with no waiting times.
identidad.card2_desc: We are a family business with over 10 years of experience in the airport sector. Our philosophy is based on direct interaction and operational excellence.
identidad.card2_feat1_desc: We guarantee a personalized and decisive approach in every interaction.
identidad.card2_feat2_desc: Exclusive reception and delivery service designed for the frequent traveler.

testimonios.title: TESTIMONIALS
testimonios.subtitle: What those who already entrust their vehicle to us have to say.

cards.name: RICARDO MARTÍNEZ
cards.text: "Impeccable Valet service. They received my car at the terminal and delivered it to me in minutes when I returned. Much more comfortable and faster than parking at the airport."

cards.name: LAURA SÍVORI
cards.text: "Security is my priority and here I slept peacefully. Truly enclosed garages and the shuttle to the terminal was immediate. I didn't even wait 5 minutes."

cards.name: JUAN PABLO FERRO
cards.text: "Great value for money. The savings compared to official parking are significant and the service is much more personalized. I recommend it 100%."

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking.

items.a: Yes, both walls and roof — completely enclosed. Your vehicle is fully protected from rain, hail, wind and sun. No semi-covered or open-air spaces.

items.q: DO I HAVE TO LEAVE MY KEYS?
items.a: Yes, we keep your keys to reposition vehicles inside the facility as needed. For your peace of mind, we photograph the odometer and fuel level before moving it.

items.q: HOW AND WHEN DO I PAY?
items.a: You can pay at check-in or check-out — your choice. We accept cash (ARS), bank transfer and Mercado Pago.

items.q: WHAT IF MY FLIGHT IS DELAYED OR CHANGED?
items.a: No problem at all. Just let us know via WhatsApp and we'll adjust your schedule. We operate 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

items.q: HOW MANY PEOPLE DOES THE SHUTTLE INCLUDE?
items.a: The airport shuttle fits up to 4 passengers with standard luggage at no extra cost. It's already included in your parking rate.
Yes, you can cancel anytime and at no cost whatsoever. No penalties, no cancellation fees. Just let us know via WhatsApp.

footer.rights: Cocheras Ezeiza Sur. All rights reserved.

terminos.meta_title: Terms and Conditions — Cocheras Ezeiza Sur
terminos.page_subtitle: Please read the conditions of use for our parking and transfer services carefully.

sections.title: RESERVATIONS AND CONFIRMATION
content: The service is confirmed exclusively via WhatsApp to Cocheras Ezeiza Sur's official number. The reservation is valid only for the period, service, and vehicle stated at the time of confirmation.
The length of stay is calculated in exact 24-hour blocks from the effective check-in time. Any fraction exceeding a full block is counted as an additional day.

sections.title: RATES AND PAYMENT METHODS
content: The applicable rates are those published on the website at the time of check-in. The online quote tool provides an estimate; the final rate is calculated at vehicle pick-up.
Payment is due at pick-up. We accept Argentine pesos cash, bank transfer, and Mercado Pago.

sections.title: CANCELLATIONS AND MODIFICATIONS
content: Cancellations are free of charge up to 24 hours before the agreed check-in time. Changes to dates, times, or service type are coordinated via WhatsApp at no extra cost.
No partial refunds are issued for early departures or stays shorter than those originally booked.

sections.title: VEHICLE RESPONSIBILITY
content: Upon arrival, the customer hands over the vehicle keys to our staff to allow repositioning within the facility. Keys are kept securely at all times.
Cocheras Ezeiza Sur operates 24/7 surveillance and security cameras. We are not responsible for personal belongings, cash, documents, or valuables left inside the vehicle.
Any pre-existing or incurred damage must be reported before leaving the premises. Claims submitted after departure will not be accepted.

sections.title: TRANSFER SERVICE
content: The airport transfer is included in the base rate and covers up to 4 passengers with standard hand luggage. Departure times are coordinated based on the flight time provided.
For international flights we recommend arriving at least 3½ hours before departure; for domestic flights, 2½ hours. Cocheras Ezeiza Sur is not responsible for delays beyond its control.

sections.title: VALET PARKING
content: Valet Parking carries an additional charge depending on the airport combination chosen: {valet_standard} ARS for pick-up and drop-off at the same airport (Ezeiza or Aeroparque); {valet_combinado} ARS for the combined service between both airports.
The Combined Valet service requires prior coordination at least 48 hours in advance. Services involving unlisted airports are quoted manually.

sections.title: HOURS AND ACCESS
content: The facility operates 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. Check-in and check-out can be arranged at any time by contacting us via WhatsApp in advance.
Address: {direccion}

sections.title: LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
content: We assume no liability for damage caused by natural disasters, third-party acts outside our premises, or force majeure circumstances.
Our maximum liability for any claim is limited to the value of the rate paid for the stay in question.

sections.title: CONTACT
content: For enquiries, complaints, or suggestions please reach us via our official WhatsApp number, by email at {email}, or visit us at our facility.
We reserve the right to update these terms. Changes take effect upon publication on this site.

politicas.page_subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.title: DATA WE COLLECT
content: When confirming a reservation via WhatsApp we collect: your name or alias, vehicle licence plate number, flight number, and check-in and check-out dates and times.
We do not collect banking details, credit card numbers, or any financial information.

sections.title: USE OF INFORMATION
content: The data collected is used exclusively to manage your reservation, coordinate the service, and communicate any operational changes.
We do not use your data for advertising purposes or automated profiling.

sections.title: STORAGE AND SECURITY
content: Information is stored in the company's WhatsApp Business conversation history, subject to Meta Platforms' privacy policies.
We apply reasonable security measures and retain data only for as long as necessary to provide the service.

sections.title: DATA SHARING
content: We do not share, sell, or transfer your personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.
Information may only be shared if required by a competent authority through a court order, in compliance with applicable Argentine law.

sections.title: COOKIES
content: This website does not use tracking cookies, behavioural advertising, or analytics scripts that identify individual users.
We may use basic access statistics tools that do not allow direct identification of individuals.

sections.title: YOUR RIGHTS
content: In accordance with Argentine Personal Data Protection Law No. 25,326, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data.
To exercise these rights, contact us via WhatsApp or email us at {email}. We will respond within 15 business days.

sections.title: CHANGES TO THIS POLICY
content: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this website.
We recommend reviewing it periodically to stay informed.

sections.title: CONTACT
content: For questions about how your data is handled, contact us via WhatsApp or email us at {email}.
Address: {direccion}
